message:
fix(engine): replace unchecked integer sums with saturating arithmetic across all modules

Convert all .iter().sum() patterns to .fold(0, saturating_add) to prevent
silent integer overflow in release builds. Fix entropic policy morphing blend
computation to use saturating sub/add, capture from_profile_name before
mutation, and use saturating increment for applied_count.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
